title: clerodendrum pygmaeum
intro: Clerodendrum pygmaeum, also known as the dwarf glory bower, is a flowering plant species within the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, Clerodendrum pygmaeum has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as aiding in the treatment of fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as having antiseptic and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, Clerodendrum pygmaeum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
